name: FIRST MERCHANTS CORP
business: First Merchants Corporation is a financial holding company offering community banking services through its subsidiary First Merchants Bank. It provides commercial and consumer banking, mortgage banking, and wealth management services to customers in Indiana, Ohio, and Michigan. The company's common stock is traded on Nasdaq under the symbol FRME.

exposures.sentence: If our employees continue or are required to work remotely, the Corporation will be exposed to increased cybersecurity risks such as phishing, malware, and other cybersecurity attacks, all of which could expose us to liability and could seriously disrupt our business operations.

catalysts.event: Completion of acquisition of First Savings Financial Group, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On February 1, 2026, the Corporation completed the acquisition of First Savings Financial Group, Inc., an Indiana corporation (First Savings), pursuant to the Agreement and Plan of Merger, dated as of September 24, 2025, by and between the Corporation and First Savings (the Merger Agreement).
